features.name: Lay On Hands
features.description: You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you finish a Long Rest. With that pool, you can restore a total of 40 HP. As a Bonus Action, you can touch a creature (which could be yourself) and restore a number HP to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in the pool. You can also expend 5 HP from the pool of healing to remove the Poisoned condition from the creature; those points don’t also restore HP to the creature.

features.name: Lay On Hands: Healing Pool: 40 / Long Rest
features.description: Bonus Action

features.name: Lay On Hands: Heal: 1 Bonus Action
Lay On Hands: Purify Poison: 1 Bonus Action
Fighting Style feat
features.description: Fighting Style feat • br-2024 110

features.name: Paladin’s Smite
features.description: You always have Divine Smite prepared and cast it without expending a spell slot once per Long Rest.

features.name: Channel Divinity
features.description: You can channel energy directly from the Outer Planes to fuel magical effects. Each time you use this class’s Channel Divinity, you can choose which effect to Paladin 8 / Fighter 3 / Warlock 3 Variant Aasimar create. You can use this class’s Channel Divinity 2 times per Long Rest, but can regain one expended use after finishing a Short Rest. If your Channel Divinity requires a saving throw, the DC equals your Paladin spell save DC (DC 17).

features.name: Channel Divinity: Divine Sense: 1 Bonus Action
2 / Long Rest
features.description: 2 / Long Rest • 1 Action

features.name: Oath of Vengeance
features.description: Oath of Vengeance

features.name: Oath of Vengeance Spells
features.description: When you reach a Paladin level specified in the Oath of Vengeance Spells table, you thereafter always have the listed spells prepared.

features.name: Vow of Enmity
features.description: When you take the Attack action, you can expend one use of Channel Divinity to utter a vow of enmity against a creature you can see within 30 ft. You have Advantage on attack rolls against that creature for 1 minute or until you use this feature again. If the creature drops to 0 HP, you can transfer the vow to a different creature within 30 ft.

features.name: 1 Action
features.description: 1 Action

features.name: Extra Attack
features.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

features.name: Faithful Steed
features.description: You always have Find Steed prepared, and can cast it once per Long Rest without expending a spell slot. Cupam_Primus Criminal 144,900

features.name: Aura of Protection
features.description: You radiate a protective aura in a 10-ft. Emanation that originates from you. The aura is inactive if you have the Incapacitated condition. You and your allies in the aura gain a +4 to saving throws while in the aura. If another Paladin is present, a creature can benefit from only one Aura of Protection at a time; and chooses which aura while in them.

features.name: Relentless Avenger
features.description: When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, you can reduce its Speed to 0 until the end of the current turn. You can also move up to half your Speed as part of the same Reaction without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

features.name: 1 Reaction
features.description: 1 Reaction

features.name: Second Wind
features.description: As a Bonus Action, you can draw upon a limited well of physical and mental stamina and regain 1d10+3 HP. You can use this 2 times per Long Rest, and can regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest.

features.name: Action Surge
features.description: On your turn you can take one additional action, except the Magic action. You can use this feature 1 time(s) until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

features.name: 1 / Short Rest
features.description: 1 / Short Rest • Special

features.name: Tactical Mind
features.description: When you fail an ability check, you can expend a use of Second Wind, and instead of regaining HP, you roll 1d10 and add the result to the ability check. If the check still fails, this use of Second Wind isn’t expended.

features.name: Special
features.description: Special

features.name: Champion
features.description: Champion

features.name: Improved Critical
features.description: Your attack rolls with weapons and Unarmed Strikes

features.name: Remarkable Athlete
features.description: You have Advantage on Initiative and Strength (Athletic) checks. Immediately after you score a Critical Hit, you can move up to half your Speed without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

features.name: Core Warlock Traits
features.description: Paladin 8 / Fighter 3 / Warlock 3 Variant Aasimar

features.name: Eldritch Invocations
features.description: You have unearthed Eldritch Invocations, pieces of forbidden knowledge that imbue you with an abiding magical ability or other lessons. If an invocation has a prerequisite, you must meet it to learn that invocation.

features.name: Lessons of the First Ones
features.description: Lessons of the First Ones • br-2024 You gain one Origin feat of your choice.

features.name: Pact of the Blade
features.description: Pact of the Blade • br-2024 As a Bonus Action, you can conjure a pact weapon in your hand, or create a bond with a magic weapon you touch. You can’t bond with a magic weapon if someone else attuned to it or another Warlock is bonded with it. Until the bond ends, you’re proficient with it and can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Whenever you attack with the bonded weapon, you can use your Cha. instead of Str. or Dex.; and you can cause it to deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage or its normal damage type. feature’s Bonus Action again, if the weapon is more than 5 ft. away from you for more than 1 minute, or if you die. A conjured weapon disappears when the bond ends.

features.name: Pact of the Blade: Conjure: 1 Bonus Action
Pact of the Blade: Bond: 1 Bonus Action

features.description: Once per Long Rest, you can perform an esoteric rite for 1 minute, regaining up to 1 expended Pact Magic ADDITIONAL Cupam_Primus Criminal 144,900 spell slots.

features.description: Once per long rest as an action, touch a creature and restore 14 hit points.

features.name: Celestial Legacy
features.description: You know the light cantrip. [3rd] You can cast lesser restoration once per long rest. [5th] You can cast daylight once per long rest. CHA is your spellcasting ability.

features.name: Sovereign of the Battlefield
features.description: Few warriors truly command a battlefield. Fewer still become its sovereign. Your instincts, speed, and presence allow you to seize fleeting moments others cannot perceive. Once per turn, you may take one additional action on your turn. This action may be used to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Dodge, or Use an Object.

features.name: Resilient
features.description: Ability Score Increase. Choose one ability in which you lack saving throw proficiency and increase the chosen ability score by 1. Saving Throw Proficiency. You gain saving throw proficiency with the chosen ability.

features.name: Dexterity
features.description: Dexterity • Increase your DEX score by 1 and you gain proficiency in DEX saving throws.

features.name: Protection
features.description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 ft. of you, you can take a Reaction to interpose your Shield if you’re holding one. You impose Disadvantage on the triggering attack roll and all other attack rolls against the target until the start of your next turn if you remain within 5 ft. of the Paladin 8 / Fighter 3 / Warlock 3 Variant Aasimar target.

features.name: Alert
features.description: Initiative Proficiency. When you roll Initiative, add +5 to the roll. Initiative Swap. Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can’t make this swap if you or the ally has the Incapacitated condition.

features.name: Increase two scores (+2 / +1)
features.description: Increase two scores (+2 / +1) •

features.name: Defense
features.description: You gain +1 to AC when wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor.

features.name: Javelin (Slow)
features.description: Javelin (Slow) • Slow. If you hit a creature with a Javelin and deal damage to the creature, you can reduce its Speed by 10 ft. until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once with this property, the Speed reduction doesn’t exceed 10 ft.

features.name: Mace (Sap)
features.description: Mace (Sap) • Sap. If you hit a creature with a Mace, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

features.name: Warhammer (Push)
features.description: Warhammer (Push) • Push. If you hit a creature with Warhammer, you can push the creature up to 10 ft. straight away from you if it’s Large or smaller.

features.description: Sap (Mace): 1 Action

features.description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice. Repeatable. You can take this feat more than once.

features.name: Tough
features.description: When you take this feat, your HP maximum increases by 28. Whenever you gain a character level thereafter, your HP maximum increases an additional 2 HP.

actions.description: When you take the Attack action, you can expend one use of Channel Divinity to utter a vow of enmity against a creature you can see within 30 ft. You have Advantage on attack rolls against that creature for 1 minute or until you use this feature again. If the creature drops to 0 HP, you can transfer the vow to a different creature within 30 ft.

actions.name: Extra Attack
actions.description: You can attack twice instead of once whenever you take the Attack action on your turn.

actions.name: Action Surge
actions.description: On your turn you can take one additional action, except the Magic action. You can use this feature 1 time(s) until you finish a Short or Long Rest.

actions.name: Genie's Vessel: Bottled Respite: 1 / Long Rest
actions.description: Genie's Vessel: Bottled Respite: 1 / Long Rest • 1 Action

actions.name: Healing Hands
actions.description: Once per long rest as an action, touch a creature and restore 14 hit points.

actions.name: Sovereign of the Battlefield
actions.description: Few warriors truly command a battlefield. Fewer still become its sovereign. Your instincts, speed, and presence allow you to seize fleeting moments others cannot perceive. Once per turn, you may take one additional action on your turn. This action may be used to Attack, Dash, Disengage, Dodge, or Use an Object.

bonusActions.name: Lay On Hands
bonusActions.description: You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you finish a Long Rest. With that pool, you can restore a total of 40 HP. As a Bonus Action, you can touch a creature (which could be yourself) and restore a number HP to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in the pool. You can also expend 5 HP from the pool of healing to remove the Poisoned condition from the creature; those points don’t also restore HP to the creature.

Second Wind
bonusActions.description: As a Bonus Action, you can draw upon a limited well of physical and mental stamina and regain 1d10+3 HP. You can use this 2 times per Long Rest, and can regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest.

bonusActions.name: Pact of the Blade
bonusActions.description: Pact of the Blade • br-2024 As a Bonus Action, you can conjure a pact weapon in your hand, or create a bond with a magic weapon you touch. You can’t bond with a magic weapon if someone else attuned to it or another Warlock is bonded with it. Until the bond ends, you’re proficient with it and can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Whenever you attack with the bonded weapon, you can use your Cha. instead of Str. or Dex.; and you can cause it to deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage or its normal damage type. feature’s Bonus Action again, if the weapon is more than 5 ft. away from you for more than 1 minute, or if you die. A conjured weapon disappears when the bond ends.

reactions.name: Relentless Avenger
reactions.description: When you hit a creature with an Opportunity Attack, you can reduce its Speed to 0 until the end of the current turn. You can also move up to half your Speed as part of the same Reaction without provoking Opportunity Attacks.

reactions.name: Protection
reactions.description: When a creature you can see attacks a target other than you that is within 5 ft. of you, you can take a Reaction to interpose your Shield if you’re holding one. You impose Disadvantage on the triggering attack roll and all other attack rolls against the target until the start of your next turn if you remain within 5 ft. of the Paladin 8 / Fighter 3 / Warlock 3 Variant Aasimar target.

passives.name: Channel Divinity
passives.description: You can channel energy directly from the Outer Planes to fuel magical effects. passives.description: You know the light cantrip. [3rd] You can cast lesser restoration once per long rest. [5th] You can cast daylight once per long rest. CHA is your spellcasting ability.

passives.name: Resilient
passives.description: Ability Score Increase. Choose one ability in which you lack saving throw proficiency and increase the chosen ability score by 1. Saving Throw Proficiency. You gain saving throw proficiency with the chosen ability.

passives.name: Dexterity
passives.description: Dexterity • Increase your DEX score by 1 and you gain proficiency in DEX saving throws.

passives.name: Alert
passives.description: Initiative Proficiency. When you roll Initiative, add +5 to the roll. Initiative Swap. Immediately after you roll Initiative, you can swap your Initiative with the Initiative of one willing ally in the same combat. You can’t make this swap if you or the ally has the Incapacitated condition.

passives.description: Increase two scores (+2 / +1) •

passives.name: Defense
passives.description: You gain +1 to AC when wearing Light, Medium, or Heavy armor.

passives.name: Javelin (Slow)
passives.description: Javelin (Slow) • Slow. If you hit a creature with a Javelin and deal damage to the creature, you can reduce its Speed by 10 ft. until the start of your next turn. If the creature is hit more than once with this property, the Speed reduction doesn’t exceed 10 ft.

passives.name: Mace (Sap)
passives.description: Mace (Sap) • Sap. If you hit a creature with a Mace, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

passives.name: Warhammer (Push)
passives.description: Warhammer (Push) • Push. If you hit a creature with Warhammer, you can push the creature up to 10 ft. straight away from you if it’s Large or smaller.

passives.name: Skilled
passives.description: You gain proficiency in any combination of three skills or tools of your choice. Repeatable. You can take this feat more than once.

passives.name: Tough
passives.description: When you take this feat, your HP maximum increases by 28. Whenever you gain a character level thereafter, your HP maximum increases an additional 2 HP.

passives.name: Maul (Topple)
passives.description: Maul (Topple) • Topple. If you hit a creature with a Maul, you can force it to make a Con. saving throw (DC 8 + 5 + the ability modifier used to make the attack). On a failed save, the creature has the Prone condition.

passives.name: Spear (Sap)
passives.description: Spear (Sap) • Sap. If you hit a creature with a Spear, that creature has Disadvantage on its next attack roll before the start of your next turn.

bonusActions.name: Lay On Hands
bonusActions.description: You have a pool of healing power that replenishes when you finish a Long Rest. With that pool, you can restore a total of 40 HP. As a Bonus Action, you can touch a creature (which could be yourself) and restore a number HP to that creature, up to the maximum amount remaining in the pool. You can also expend 5 HP from the pool of healing to remove the Poisoned condition from the creature; those points don’t also restore HP to the creature.

Second Wind
bonusActions.description: As a Bonus Action, you can draw upon a limited well of physical and mental stamina and regain 1d10+3 HP. You can use this 2 times per Long Rest, and can regain one expended use when you finish a Short Rest.

bonusActions.name: Pact of the Blade
bonusActions.description: Pact of the Blade • br-2024 As a Bonus Action, you can conjure a pact weapon in your hand, or create a bond with a magic weapon you touch. You can’t bond with a magic weapon if someone else attuned to it or another Warlock is bonded with it. Until the bond ends, you’re proficient with it and can use it as a Spellcasting Focus. Whenever you attack with the bonded weapon, you can use your Cha. instead of Str. or Dex.; and you can cause it to deal Necrotic, Psychic, or Radiant damage or its normal damage type. feature’s Bonus Action again, if the weapon is more than 5 ft. away from you for more than 1 minute, or if you die. A conjured weapon disappears when the bond ends.

passives.description: You can channel energy directly from the Outer Planes to fuel magical effects. Each time you use this class’s Channel Divinity, you can choose which effect to Paladin 8 / Fighter 3 / Warlock 3 Variant Aasimar create. You can use this class’s Channel Divinity 2 times per Long Rest, but can regain one expended use after finishing a Short Rest.
